hero.title: Websites, stores and automations that actually launch
hero.subtitle: I help small businesses move from idea to a working system: offer, design, code, domain, forms, payments, SEO, AI search and automation.
hero.body: Start with free guides. If it gets messy, I can audit, fix or build the whole thing.

salesPath.title: Three clean entry points
salesPath.subtitle: Pick what is cheaper in time and risk right now: DIY, rescue audit or full build.

items.label: DIY
items.title: Build it yourself
items.text: Free guides for Cursor, Codex, GitHub, Vercel, AI pipelines and human-in-the-loop workflows.

items.label: RESCUE
items.title: Audit and fix
items.text: For broken Cursor projects, domain issues, dead forms, messy layouts or AI-demo-looking sites.

items.label: BUILD
items.title: Full build
items.text: Landing page, business site, Shopify/e-commerce, ticketing, bot or automation with launch and handoff.

contact.headline: Show me the project — I will map the next move
